_review_reason: Pure earnings + discount card. 5% Disney+/Hulu/ESPN+, 2% gas/grocery/restaurants/Disney US, 1% other (earnings). 'Up to 500 Disney Rewards Dollars/yr' is the cashback cap, not a statement credit. 10% merchandise/dining at Disneyland/Disney World (% discount, conditional on visiting parks). No fixed USD recurring credits.
_excluded: 10% select dining at parks (% off, conditional)
$200 Disney Gift Card + $100 statement credit SUB (one-time)
